rationale: The translation is technically accurate and preserves the complex MDX structure, including SVGs and asset paths. The previous judge's suggestion to change a code comment from imperative to infinitive is a stylistic preference rather than a high-priority error in this context, as both are acceptable in technical documentation. The translation maintains Dan's direct style and correctly localizes all reader-facing content while keeping code blocks intact.

suggestionLog.match: # Stockez les fichiers de la base de données sur un chemin local, en dehors du conteneur
suggestionLog.replacement: # Stocker les fichiers de la base de données sur un chemin local, en dehors du conteneur
suggestionLog.reason: Code comments should generally use the infinitive form in French for instructions.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
